title: From Exploitation in Foreign Land to Building Paradise Anywhere

current_reality.situation: Immigrant to wealthy country, legal or illegal, 1-15 years in country
current_reality.daily_life: Work hardest jobs natives won't do, send money home, survive in margins
current_reality.extraction: Exploitation - paid less than natives, threatened with deportation if complain
current_reality.living_conditions: Crowded housing, multiple roommates, often 6-10 people in 2-bedroom
current_reality.soul_cost: Away from homeland, family, culture - sacrificing everything for survival
current_reality.future: Work until deported or body breaks, maybe bring family over into same exploitation, die having sacrificed everything for next generation's chance

immediate: Paid less than natives for same work - $10/hour vs $15/hour
Exploited by employers who know you're desperate
Crowded housing - $400/month to share room with 3 others
Send money home - $500/month to family, survive on $1,000/month
Cultural isolation - don't speak language well, don't fit in
legal_status_issues: If undocumented: Constant fear of deportation, ICE raids, separation from family
If legal: Visa tied to employer - can't quit even if abused, trapped
Can't access benefits - not eligible even if desperate
deeper: Left everything for opportunity - finding exploitation instead
Work harder than natives - paid less, respected less
Skills undervalued - engineer in homeland, dishwasher here
Family sacrificed - haven't seen children/parents in years
Culture lost - children will be foreigners to both lands
Permanent outsider - never fully accepted here, can't return there
existential: Sacrificed homeland for what? Poverty in foreign land?
Children will forget language, culture, heritage - for what?
Work yourself to death in country that sees you as problem
Never belong anywhere - not there anymore, not here ever
Die in foreign land having given everything for nothing
Legacy: Exploited immigrant who made next generation foreigners

Agriculture - knowledge from homeland valuable for desert farming

comparison: Current: $25k/year × 30 years = $750k lifetime in foreign land
Send home: $500/month × 30 years × 12 = $180k sent to family
tokens_of_appreciation.meaning: Finally compensated fairly - origin doesn't matter, contribution does

options: Return home WEALTHY - $3M+/year, help entire village/family
Bring family to you - can afford to relocate entire extended family
Stay in new country - with $3M+/year, welcomed everywhere as wealthy investor
Build in homeland - tokens fund development projects in your country
Next quest - continue with longevity research or other missions
Retire - mission complete, sacrifices redeemed, family secure forever
family_reunion: Bring everyone - parents, siblings, children, all secured by your tokens
Or visit freely - $3M+/year means travel unlimited
Send money - but real amounts now, $100k+/year not $6k/year
Secure homeland - fund projects there, improve village, build paradise there too

the_call.invitation: Join immigrants from every nation building paradise together - no borders in BARRACKS

the_call.urgency: Years away from family - every year more sacrifice - 2 years BARRACKS ends sacrifice FOREVER
